channel.title: Entertainment
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from Entertainment, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Kelly Clarkson’s Best Area Rug and Furniture Deals Are Hiding in Wayfair’s Closeout Section — Up to 86% Off
item.description: Shop vintage- and French country-inspired pieces

item.title: Eric Dane Died on 20th Anniversary of His First “Grey's Anatomy” Appearance as Mark Sloan
item.description: Dane died at 53 on Thursday, Feb. 19, nearly one year after going public with his ALS diagnosis

item.title: Martha Stewart’s Gorgeous Floral Coat Costs $4,990, but You Can Welcome Spring in Similar Amazon Jackets from $20
item.description: Don’t wait for April showers to bring wardrobe flowers

item.title: Happy 38th Birthday, Rihanna! Look Back at the Star's Most Memorable Outfits
item.description: From her glam red carpet gowns to her head-turning maternity style, here’s a look back at Rihanna's best fashion moments to date

item.title: Amanda Seyfried Radiates Beauty at “The Testament of Ann Lee ”Premiere in Berlin, Plus Jennifer Garner, Al Roker and More
item.description: From Los Angeles to New York City, and everywhere in between, see what your favorite stars are up to

item.title: Rob Lowe Jokingly Demands Credit For Role in 1995 Film 'Tommy Boy'
